description: Effect definitions for sections (contentBlock, divider). Referenced from builder-schema.json / section-blocks.json.

effects.label: Backdrop blur
effects.description: Blurs the content behind the section (e.g. video or background).

props.name: amount
props.description: CSS blur radius, e.g. 8px, 12px, 24px. Default: 12px.

effects.label: Glass
effects.description: Applies the SVG displacement-map glass shader to the section/element surface.

props.name: bezelType
props.description: Surface profile: convex_circle | convex_squircle | concave | lip. Default: convex_squircle.

props.name: bezelWidth
props.description: Bezel width. Number > 1 = px, number 0..1 = ratio of half-min dimension, string accepts px/%.

props.name: glassThickness
props.description: Glass depth used in refraction ray travel. Number > 1 = px, number 0..1 = ratio of 1200 baseline, string accepts px/%.

props.name: refractiveIndex
props.description: Physical index of refraction. Range 1..3. Default: 1.5.

props.name: blur
props.description: Gaussian blur before displacement. Number maps directly to stdDeviation; string accepts px.

props.name: scaleRatio
props.description: Multiplier applied to computed displacement scale. Range: 0.001..8. Default: 1.

props.name: specularOpacity
props.description: Opacity of specular highlight layer. Range: 0..1. Default: 0.9.

props.name: specularSaturation
props.description: Saturation boost for displaced layer. Range: 0..50. Default: 4.

props.name: magnifyingScale
props.description: Optional radial magnifying displacement pass. 0 disables; positive numbers increase lens effect.

props.name: dropShadow
props.description: When true, keeps the default glass shadow shell. Default: true.

effects.label: Drop shadow
effects.description: Adds a shadow behind the section.

props.name: x
props.description: Horizontal offset, e.g. 0px. Default: 0px.

props.name: y
props.description: Vertical offset, e.g. 4px. Default: 4px.

props.name: blur
props.description: Blur radius, e.g. 24px. Default: 24px.

props.name: spread
props.description: Spread radius, e.g. 0px. Default: none.

props.name: color
props.description: Shadow color, e.g. rgba(0,0,0,0.15). Default: rgba(0,0,0,0.15).

effects.label: Inner shadow
effects.description: Adds an inset shadow inside the section.

props.name: x
props.description: Horizontal offset, e.g. 0px. Default: 0px.

props.name: y
props.description: Vertical offset, e.g. 4px. Default: 4px.

props.name: blur
props.description: Blur radius, e.g. 24px. Default: 24px.

props.name: spread
props.description: Spread radius, e.g. 0px. Default: none.

props.name: color
props.description: Shadow color, e.g. rgba(0,0,0,0.15). Default: rgba(0,0,0,0.15).

effects.label: Glow
effects.description: Adds a glowing effect around the section.

props.name: blur
props.description: Blur radius, e.g. 20px. Default: 20px.

props.name: spread
props.description: Spread radius, e.g. 0px. Default: 0px.

props.name: color
props.description: Glow color, e.g. rgba(0,0,0,0.5). Default: rgba(0,0,0,0.5).

effects.label: Opacity
effects.description: Sets the opacity of the section.

props.name: value
props.description: Opacity value between 0 and 1. Default: 1.

props.name: amount
props.description: CSS blur radius, e.g. 4px. Default: 4px.

effects.label: Brightness
effects.description: Adjusts the brightness of the section.

props.name: value
props.description: Brightness multiplier (1 = normal, >1 = brighter, <1 = darker). Default: 1.

effects.label: Contrast
effects.description: Adjusts the contrast of the section.

props.name: value
props.description: Contrast multiplier (1 = normal, >1 = more contrast, <1 = less contrast). Default: 1.

effects.label: Saturate
effects.description: Adjusts the saturation of the section.

props.name: value
props.description: Saturation multiplier (1 = normal, >1 = more saturated, <1 = less saturated). Default: 1.

props.name: value
props.description: Grayscale amount (0 = full color, 1 = full grayscale). Default: 0.

effects.label: Sepia
effects.description: Applies a sepia tone to the section.

props.name: value
props.description: Sepia amount (0 = no sepia, 1 = full sepia). Default: 0.
